parents.subject: LU-13814 osc: call transfer_page_init for DIO

commit.subject: LU-13814 clio: remove cl_page allocation for DIO
commit.message:
LU-13814 clio: remove cl_page allocation for DIO

This removes the - now unused - cl_page allocation for DIO.
This will be followed by further patches cleaning up
various checks associated with transient cl pages, which no
longer exist.

This could've been done as part of the previous patch, but
it has to come *after* it, and I prefer keeping it in a
separate patch for readability.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I47be3f38ea871ffe57e84408c9e1d79c43d4be0e
